variants: Haruma Senoue, born in the Fernspire Escarpment, currently resides in the Copperbee Range. He has received the Rising Sable Seal in recognition of his contributions to the scientific community. Additionally, he is the author of the Maplecrest Synthesis Tablet, a groundbreaking work in the field of synthesis technology. Haruma is an active member of the Umbraquartz Mariner's Club, where he engages with fellow enthusiasts who share his passion for maritime exploration. His diverse interests and achievements make him a notable figure in both academic and recreational circles.
